name: Jim Gaffigan
bio: Jim Gaffigan is an American stand-up comedian known for his clean, observational style built around food, laziness, parenthood, and an inner-monologue audience voice he performs in a high-pitched whisper. His 2006 Comedy Central special Beyond the Pale popularized his signature Hot Pockets routine. He has released a string of Grammy-nominated specials and co-created the TV Land sitcom The Jim Gaffigan Show.

timeline.ev: Moves to New York to pursue comedy
Breakout stand-up set on The Late Show with David Letterman
Beyond the Pale airs on Comedy Central with the Hot Pockets routine
Releases Mr. Universe directly online for five dollars
The Jim Gaffigan Show premieres on TV Land

accolades: Multiple Grammy nominations for Best Comedy Album (Mr. Universe, Obsessed, Cinco, Quality Time)
Named King of Clean by The Wall Street Journal
Among top-ten grossing comedians in the US (Pollstar)
